title: What Is Quercetin and Why Women Over 40 Are Taking It
seo_title: What Is Quercetin and Why Women Over 40 Take It
meta_description: Quercetin is a plant antioxidant with anti-inflammatory, immune, and senolytic properties. Learn what it is, what research supports, and how it helps women over 40.
tags: Immunity, Quercetin, Anti-Aging, Inflammation, Supplements, Longevity
